data.title: HBAR expected to reach $0.10-$0.12 by April 2026, with short-term target at $0.095 and critical support at $0.086.
data.description: Summary of HBAR Price Predictions: The short-term target for HBAR within a week is $0.095. In the medium-term, the forecast ranges from $0.10 to $0.12. The bullish breakout level is anticipated to be at $0.10, while crucial support for HBAR is at $0.086, as per market analysis.

data.title: Magnachip Launches 8th-Generation 40V and 60V MV MOSFETs for Servers and High-Performance PCs
data.description: In South Korea, Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation introduced its latest 8th-generation 40V and 60V Medium-Voltage (MV) MOSFETs, specifically tailored for server and high-performance PC power supply units. The demand for power in the worldwide server and data center sector is on the rise, emphasizing the significance of power efficiency and density in power semiconductor solutions for these applications. The new MOSFETs aim to address this need.

data.title: Oatly to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in MALMÖ, Sweden, Oatly Group AB (Nasdaq: OTLY), the leading oat drink company globally, announced the upcoming release of its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before the U.S. market opens. A conference call and webcast will follow at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to analyze the results.

data.title: Ellomay Capital to Sell its Indirect Holdings in Dorad Energy Ltd. based on a Dorad Valuation of NIS 4.4 Billion
data.description: Today, Ellomay Capital Ltd. disclosed the outcome of the separation procedure involving Ellomay Luzon Energy Infrastructures Ltd. The company, which specializes in renewable energy and power generation across Europe, the USA, and Israel, revealed that Ellomay Luzon Energy, co-owned by the company and the Luzon Group on a 50%-50% basis, possesses a key asset in the form of a 33.75% stake in Dorad Energy Ltd. This separation marks a significant development in Ellomay's portfolio.

data.title: Beijing seen as a hub for youth innovation
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Beijing announced its initiative to establish itself as a leading global center for youth innovation and entrepreneurship. To achieve this goal, the city has introduced a detailed policy framework aimed at enhancing inclusivity and promoting a more business-friendly environment. This strategy is designed to attract young entrepreneurs and innovators, fostering a dynamic ecosystem for economic growth and creativity. The initiative underscores Beijing's commitment to cultivating a vibrant and supportive environment for aspiring business leaders.

data.title: Sable Offshore Corp. kicks off oil sales from the Santa Ynez Pipeline System. #OilSales #SantaYnez #SableOffshoreCorp
data.description: A recent report revealed that the country's economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing analyst predictions of 2.8% growth. This growth was largely driven by a 5% increase in consumer spending, which reached a total of $1.2 trillion. Additionally, exports saw a significant boost of 8%, leading to a trade surplus of $500 billion for the country. The labor market also showed signs of improvement, with unemployment dropping to 4.2%, the lowest rate in the last five years. Overall, the economic outlook appears positive, with experts forecasting continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Algorand aims for $0.09 rebound despite bearish trend, facing key $0.08 support test with neutral RSI at 41.67. MACD warns traders.
data.description: According to the latest ALGO price forecast, there is a possibility of a rebound towards the resistance level of $0.09. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently stands at 41.67, indicating a neutral stance. However, Algorand is currently being tested at the $0.08 support level, which will be crucial for its future movement. The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is showing bearish signals, advising traders to approach with caution.

data.title: Boston Scientific receives FDA clearance for the Asurys™ Fluid Management System
data.description: A novel technological advancement has been created to offer a unified irrigation management system for various medical procedures including ureteroscopy, cystoscopy, percutaneous nephrolithotomy (PCNL), and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). The innovation originates from a company based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, and was announced on March 30, 2026. Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) unveiled this system, which aims to streamline the irrigation process for these specific medical interventions.

data.title: Bitcoin faces its worst six months since 2018 amid Iran tensions, marking five key developments this week.
data.description: Bitcoin experienced its first six consecutive months of decline since the 2018 bear market. This downward trend came amidst rising tensions in Iran, which had a significant impact on market stability.
